import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { ArrowLeft, User, MapPin, Clock, FileText, Car, Users, ShieldCheck, XCircle, MessageCircle, ExternalLink, Smartphone } from 'lucide-react'; const DetailSection = ({ icon: Icon, title, children }) => (

{title}

{children}
); const DetailItem = ({ label, value, subValue }) => (

{label}

{value || 'NOT DECLARED'}

{subValue &&

{subValue}

}
); const VisitorDetailView = ({ visitor, onBack, onAction }) => { if (!visitor) return null; return ( {/* Navigation Header */}
{/* Left Column: Core Info & Step 1 Recap */}
{visitor.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('')}

{visitor.name}

{visitor.id}
{/* Center & Right: Step 2 Detailed Data */}

Total Party Size: {visitor.visitorCount} PERSON(S)

{visitor.visitorCount > 1 ? (
{[...Array(visitor.visitorCount - 1)].map((_, i) => (

VISITOR {i + 2}

ADDITIONAL_VISITOR_{i + 1}_NAME

ID_NOT_PROVIDED

))}
) : (

No accompanying personnel declared.

)} {visitor.equipment.length > 0 ? (
{visitor.equipment.map((item, i) => (
{item}
DECLARED
))}
) : (

No equipment declared for this session.

)}

ID / Passport Scan (Front)

View Identity Scan

Entry Authorization Token

Pending Authorization
); }; export default VisitorDetailView;
